Latest News & Events

22 March 2025

Second Training Workshop on the OG-core model in Indonesia

UN DESA Enhances Economic Modelling Skills for Indonesian Government Officials to Strengthen Fiscal Policy.

OG-Core
Indonesia
09 March 2025

Philippine OG-PHL Users Convene to Explore Policy Applications and Model Enhancements

Participants from government agencies and academic institutions across the Philippines gathered online on March 8, 2025, to discuss recent developments on the Open Government Philippines (OG-PHL) model and its expanding use in policy work, research, and academic applications.

OG-Core
Phillipines
08 March 2025

Second Training Workshop on the OG-core model in South Africa

UN DESA Empowers South African Policymakers with Advanced Economic Modeling for Sustainable Recovery.

OG-Core
South Africa
30 November 2024

UN DESA and ESCWA Organize Advanced Training in Jordan on Macro-Fiscal Modelling

Jordan receives first national training on the WEFM model for macroeconomic forecasting.

WEFM
Jordan
16 November 2024

Introductory workshop to implement the CLEWs integrated framework in Lao PDR

Lao PDR Launches CLEWs Capacity Building with Introductory Training Workshop.

Clews
Lao PDR
26 October 2024

UNDESA Conducts In-Depth Training Workshop in the Philippines on Policy Simulations

A second intensive training was held in the Philippines on national recovery simulations using OG-PHL.

OG-Core
Phillipines
